creator: johnson.peter@gmail.com
text:
Approved with one caveat: I'd prefer the pkg-plist to be kept in sorted 
order, e.g.

--- pkg-plist   4 Oct 2006 06:00:32 -0000       1.4
+++ pkg-plist   14 Jan 2007 20:36:44 -0000
@@ -36,6 +36,9 @@
 %%PYTHON_SITELIBDIR%%/mutagen/mp3.py
 %%PYTHON_SITELIBDIR%%/mutagen/mp3.pyc
 %%PYTHON_SITELIBDIR%%/mutagen/mp3.pyo
+%%PYTHON_SITELIBDIR%%/mutagen/mp4.py
+%%PYTHON_SITELIBDIR%%/mutagen/mp4.pyc
+%%PYTHON_SITELIBDIR%%/mutagen/mp4.pyo
 %%PYTHON_SITELIBDIR%%/mutagen/musepack.py
 %%PYTHON_SITELIBDIR%%/mutagen/musepack.pyc
 %%PYTHON_SITELIBDIR%%/mutagen/musepack.pyo
@@ -54,6 +57,9 @@
 %%PYTHON_SITELIBDIR%%/mutagen/oggvorbis.py
 %%PYTHON_SITELIBDIR%%/mutagen/oggvorbis.pyc
 %%PYTHON_SITELIBDIR%%/mutagen/oggvorbis.pyo
+%%PYTHON_SITELIBDIR%%/mutagen/optimfrog.py
+%%PYTHON_SITELIBDIR%%/mutagen/optimfrog.pyc
+%%PYTHON_SITELIBDIR%%/mutagen/optimfrog.pyo
 %%PYTHON_SITELIBDIR%%/mutagen/trueaudio.py
 %%PYTHON_SITELIBDIR%%/mutagen/trueaudio.pyc
 %%PYTHON_SITELIBDIR%%/mutagen/trueaudio.pyo

instead of the pkg-plist patch in the PR.

Thanks,
Peter Johnson
